sprint: Plan 1 ECC Correction Pass — Provider Consolidation

key_reduction.after_consolidation: 1 AIMLAPI_API_KEY + 14 native service keys + 1 OAuth flow

A_gateway_keys.description: AI/model/media gateway — covers multiple LLM/media skills with ONE key

AIMLAPI_API_KEY.note: Replaces separate Anthropic/OpenAI/Gemini/fal.ai keys for these skills

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.account: Sign up at openrouter.ai (may already be configured)
OPENROUTER_API_KEY.note: If AIMLAPI_API_KEY not available, OPENROUTER_API_KEY suffices for LLM-only skills

B_native_service_connectors.description: Native service connectors — required because no aggregator covers these

TWITTER_API_KEY + TWITTER_API_SECRET + T.note: ONE Twitter Developer account covers 3 social skills

TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN.account: Auto-generated from same Twitter Developer account
TWITTER_BEARER_TOKEN.note: Read-only bearer token — cheaper than full OAuth

RESEND_API_KEY + EMAIL_FROM.account: Sign up at resend.com; verify sender domain
RESEND_API_KEY + EMAIL_FROM.note: ONE Resend account covers 3 email skills

LINEAR_API_KEY.account: Linear account at linear.app; Settings → API

steps: 5. Run browser OAuth flow to obtain GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN

D_financial_high_risk_approvals.description: Financial/high-risk — require Bryan's explicit approval beyond just keys

Stripe Integration.approval_note: Use Stripe test mode (sk_test_...) before live keys

X402 Payment Agent.approval_note: Requires Bryan explicit financial approval BEFORE providing key

E_optional_later.description: Optional keys that expand functionality but are not required

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI aggregates Anthropic Claude + OpenAI + 200+ models
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('ecc-tools-cost-audit')"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set AIMLAPI_API_KEY; enable skill in catalog

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI covers Claude/GPT/Gemini for article writing
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('article-writing')"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set AIMLAPI_API_KEY (or OPENROUTER_API_KEY if already configured); enable skill

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI can substitute for OPENROUTER_API_KEY
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('content-engine')"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set AIMLAPI_API_KEY or OPENROUTER_API_KEY; enable skill

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI covers brand analysis LLM calls
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('brand-voice')"

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI covers document generation LLM calls
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('investor-materials')"

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI covers LLM calls for training pipeline
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.sources.ecc.wrappers.execution_wrappers import ContinuousLearningV2Wrapper; w=ContinuousLearningV2Wrapper(reviewer_approved=True); print(w.run_training_cycle(dry_run=True))"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set AIMLAPI_API_KEY + Bryan approval; enable wrapper

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: AIMLAPI.com aggregates many image/video generation models including Flux, SDXL, and similar models that fal.ai provides. Specific fal.ai models (e.g. fast-sdxl, flux-dev) are available via AIMLAPI. Exact model routing may differ from native fal.ai API. If skill requires fal-specific API surface (RunPod model IDs), native key needed.
per_skill_table.final_recommended_provider: AIMLAPI (covers fal-equivalent models) — fallback to FAL_API_KEY if specific fal model ID required
per_skill_table.native_provider_reason: Only if skill requires fal.ai-specific model IDs not available via AIMLAPI
per_skill_table.live_test_command: AIMLAPI_API_KEY=$AIMLAPI_API_KEY uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('fal-ai-media')"

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: GitHub API is a native service connector — no aggregator

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: GitHub write API requires native token
per_skill_table.native_provider_reason: ECC config repo requires GitHub write access
per_skill_table.oauth_or_manual_setup: Same GITHUB_TOKEN as github-ops

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: Jira is a project management service — no aggregator
per_skill_table.native_provider_reason: Jira REST API requires native Jira credentials
per_skill_table.oauth_or_manual_setup: Generate API token at id.atlassian.com/manage-profile/security/api-tokens
per_skill_table.live_test_command: JIRA_API_TOKEN=$JIRA_API_TOKEN JIRA_BASE_URL=$JIRA_BASE_URL JIRA_EMAIL=$JIRA_EMAIL uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('jira-integration')"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set Jira env vars; enable skill

per_skill_table.aimlapi_coverage_note: Google Workspace is a native service — no aggregator

per_skill_table.live_test_command: GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID=$GC_ID GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET=$GC_SECRET GOOGLE_REFRESH_TOKEN=$GC_RT uv run python -c "from openjarvis.skills.ecc_completion import live_test_skill; live_test_skill('google-workspace-ops')"
per_skill_table.activation_route: Set Google env vars + OAuth browser flow to get refresh token
